sections.sectionSummary: The reviewer receives a redacted summary of the proposed agent workflow.
sections.reviewerNote: Review classifications, approval state, and safety boundaries before any future handoff.
sections.safetyNote: No reason text, request identifier, or target identifier is stored.

sections.sectionSummary: The command contract result is represented only as a safe plan classification.
sections.reviewerNote: Unsafe requests stay blocked before a runbook preview can be considered ready.
sections.safetyNote: Raw command JSON, parameters, paths, URLs, hosts, IPs, tokens, and secrets are omitted.

sections.sectionSummary: The default-deny policy outcome is summarized as ready, blocked, or approval-gated.
sections.reviewerNote: Policy denial prevents a ready runbook preview.
sections.safetyNote: Raw policy content, policy identifiers, and private policy rationale are omitted.

sections.sectionSummary: The dry-run plan does not require a human approval decision.
sections.reviewerNote: Approval is represented as a local dry-run classification only.
sections.safetyNote: Approval ledger content, reason text, and request details are omitted.

sections.sectionSummary: The capability registry result is reduced to a matched capability count and readiness state.
sections.reviewerNote: A missing or incompatible capability keeps the preview blocked.
sections.safetyNote: Raw capability content and agent identifiers are omitted.

sections.sectionSummary: The existing dry-run plan is referenced by a short fingerprint for public-safe correlation.
sections.reviewerNote: Only the dry-run plan status and fingerprint are carried into this preview.
sections.safetyNote: Dry-run steps are not expanded with raw command, policy, capability, or target details.

sections.sectionSummary: This preview is a review artifact only and never crosses into execution.
sections.reviewerNote: Keep execution, network contact, and agent contact outside this public milestone.
sections.safetyNote: Safety flags confirm that no command, network service, agent, or mutable filesystem target was contacted.

sections.sectionSummary: The runbook preview is ready for human review in this public-safe model.
sections.reviewerNote: Use the final status to decide whether a future private handoff could proceed.
sections.safetyNote: The preview contains only hashes, classifications, counts, section statuses, and safety confirmations.
